task.prompt: Write a function `can_view_document(user, document)` that decides whether a user can view a document.

tests.code: assert can_view_document({'id': 'u1', 'active': True, 'role': 'admin', 'department': 'engineering'}, {'owner_id': 'u1', 'status': 'active', 'legal_hold': True, 'shared_with': ['u1']}) is False
assert can_view_document({'id': 'c1', 'active': True, 'role': 'compliance', 'department': 'legal'}, {'owner_id': 'u2', 'status': 'active', 'legal_hold': True}) is True

gold_spec.goal: Authorize document viewing from user and document policy dictionaries.

outputs.name: allowed
outputs.description: whether the user may view the document

preconditions: Inputs are dictionaries. Missing optional fields are handled as defaults.
postconditions: Return False unless the user has a non-empty id and user['active'] is exactly True.
Treat missing document status as 'active'. If status is 'deleted', return False for everyone.
If document['legal_hold'] is True, allow only users with role 'compliance' and department 'legal'; this overrides owner, admin, shared_with, and department access.

For non-legal-hold documents, a base relationship exists if the user owns the document, has role 'admin', appears in document['shared_with'], or the user's department appears in document['allowed_departments'].
Treat missing shared_with and allowed_departments as empty lists.
For classification 'restricted', require both a base relationship and the user's department to appear in allowed_departments.
For all other classifications, allow any base relationship.
edge_cases: Inactive users are denied even if they are admins or owners.
Deleted documents are denied even to admins.
Restricted documents do not grant access to an admin from the wrong department unless that department is explicitly allowed.
acceptance_criteria: Deny and legal-hold rules take precedence over allow rules.

known_weakness.description: The raw prompt invites a simple owner/admin/shared check and hides the deny-first rules for inactive users, deleted documents, legal holds, and restricted classifications.
known_weakness.naive_spec_gap: admin or owner access is likely to be treated as absolute instead of being overridden by compliance and deny-by-default policy
